summary: Data Integrity Audit Complete. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend verification successful. DBS Register loads without errors (KeyError bug fixed). Training Safety Engine returns correct required_current_count (5/5, was 0/0). Data consistency verified across all views.
passed_tests: ✅ DBS Register loads without errors (/api/dbs-register) - KeyError bug FIXED
✅ Training Safety Engine returns correct required_current_count (5/5, was 0/0) - FIXED
✅ Employee list completion_percentage (91%) matches profile completion_percentage (91%)
✅ Work readiness status consistent: list=work_ready, profile=work_ready
✅ DBS Safety Engine correctly computes is_blocking=False for current DBS
✅ RTW Safety Engine correctly computes is_blocking=False for verified RTW
✅ Training Safety Engine correctly computes is_blocking=False (5/5 current)
✅ Employee profile loads with all expected fields
✅ Compliance data complete with all safety engine summaries (dbs_summary, rtw_summary, training_summary)
✅ Test employee completion percentage in expected range (91%)
✅ Test employee work readiness as expected (work_ready)
✅ Test employee DBS status as expected (current)
critical_code_review_comments: DBS Register endpoint (line 4029) correctly uses get_employee_dbs_summary() for single source of truth
Training Safety Engine (line 2052) correctly uses MANDATORY_ITEMS['training'] as source instead of empty db.requirements
Safety engines (DBS, RTW, Training) correctly compute is_blocking status
Data consistency verified: completion_percentage, work_readiness, dbs_status all match between list and profile views
Two endpoints exist for compliance: /compliance (legacy) and /compliance-requirements (with safety engine summaries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data integrity audit verified. Key findings: 1) DBS Register KeyError bug FIXED - uses .get() instead of direct dict access. 2) Training Safety Engine 0/0 bug FIXED - uses MANDATORY_ITEMS['training'] as source. 3) All safety engines (DBS, RTW, Training) correctly compute is_blocking. 4) Data consistency verified across employee list, profile, and DBS Register. 5) Two compliance endpoints exist: /compliance (legacy) and /compliance-requirements (with safety engine summaries). Test employee Olakunle Alonge: 91% completion, work_ready status, current DBS.
